name: soapysdr0.8-module-uhd
title: soapysdr0.8-module-uhd
description:
UHD device support for SoapySDR
Both SoapySDR and the Universal Hardware Driver by Ettus Research projects
provide libraries to access various software defined radio hardware through a
common interface.
.
This SoapySDR hardware support module makes all UHD devices available to
applications using SoapySDR. An interface in the other direction is available
in the uhd-soapysdr package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-uhd because UHD device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-uhd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-uhd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-uhd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
